runs.portfolio_notes: Swing book: 10 longs, 2 shorts, 2 holds. Longs concentrated in large-cap tech (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, META, GOOGL, AMZN, AMD) with high inter-correlation (QQQ/SPY 0.96; NVDA-QQQ 0.74; AMZN-QQQ 0.67) - single-name sizes trimmed and index ETF allocations cut (SPY 15, QQQ 12) to avoid double-counting tech exposure. AMD sized small (15 shares, ~$4.2k) despite high conviction due to extreme overbought (RSI 91, Z-score 3.66) and hourly STC momentum divergence. NKE + XOM shorts add negatively-correlated ballast (XOM corr -0.04 to book) and hedge tech beta. TSLA hold on multi-TF conflict; GS hold on weak daily ADX. All trades enforce R:R >= 2.0 per mandate - several head-trader R:Rs tightened via stop adjustment or target extension. Total gross exposure ~75% of $100k cash, leaving dry powder for follow-through adds. Max single position $14.2k (META) well below 20% risk-manager limit. Key monitoring: tech mean-reversion (Z-scores 1.7-3.7) could trigger book-wide drawdown given correlation; stops are the risk gate.
